text:
Want to build systems like this?
Agent Engineering: Building Multi-Agent Systems
Towards AI Academy
– the engineering behind this repo
– agent workflows, tool use, memory
– multi-agent systems & orchestration
– evals & production-grade agents
The repo gives you a working research OS — the course teaches you to build it, and the multi-agent systems beyond it.
towardsai.com
